QAData.question: Who won between Ivory Coast and Egypt on Wed, 26 Jan 2022 16:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Egypt won 0–0 (5–4) over Ivory Coast after penalties on Wed, 26 Jan 2022 16:00:00 GMT.
